Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday prior day range boundary acceptance rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0115 R0001 tests whether prior day high or prior day low acceptance with same-side hold, retest absorption, close acceptance, breakout impulse efficiency, volume acceptance, VWAP boundary alignment, opening range alignment, and prior day direction context can rank target-first continuation entries. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0114 momentum-volume divergence reversal and other recent surfaces. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.
